arts.ttl: Guglielmo Vicario fires new two-word injury message as Tottenham crisis laid bare
arts.sum: Tottenham's Guglielmo Vicario has posted a fresh update on the ankle injury he picked up during the Premier League win over Manchester City that required surgery to fix. With Vicario possibly facing up to 10 weeks out of action, regular updates on his recovery appear likely based on his recent Instagram activity.

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Roma with Bentancur return and Werner call
arts.sum: Gold's team: Forster; Porro, Dragusin, Davies, Gray; Kulusevski, Bentancur, Bergvall; Johnson, Solanke, Werner. Guest's team: Forster; Porro, Dragusin, Davies, Gray; Bentancur, Bergvall, Maddison; Johnson, Solanke, Werner.

arts.ttl: Tottenham make Ben Davies contract decision amid centre-back injury issues
arts.sum: Davies' contract was set to expire at the end of the season, but the decision to extend his deal means the club will keep some stability in defence, with Van de Ven and Romero the current first-choice duo and Dragusin knocking on the door for competition. The Welsh defender has been a bit-part player for much of Ange Postecoglou's reign at the club so far, but amid injuries to Micky van de Ven and Cristian Romero suffered in recent weeks he has stepped into the starting lineup to prove his worth to the team.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Tottenham free agent transfer stance clear after Guglielmo Vicario injury
arts.sum: In regards to signing possible free agents, football.london understands that any player currently without a club would be able to play right away as there are currently two available spaces in Tottenham's 25-man squad. Spurs are not short on options when it comes to the goalkeeping department but some fans raised the question about the possibility of the north London club looking at signing a short-term replacement .

arts.ttl: Every word Destiny Udogie said on Djed Spence, what Guglielmo Vicario told him and Bentancur ban
arts.sum: This is your second season at Tottenham, been a lot of good left-footed players at the club, what are your ambitions? Obviously, we knew was coming so expected it but just the number of games he's going to miss is a bit heavy but yes.

arts.ttl: Ranieri: Roma ‘must be smart’ against Tottenham
arts.sum: Roma coach Claudio Ranieri says the Giallorossi must be ‘smart’ against Tottenham who played ‘incredible...

arts.ttl: Ranieri: “The only two teams that could bring me out of retirement were Roma or Cagliari”
arts.sum: Roma coach Claudio Ranieri addressed the media ahead of the Europa League clash against Tottenham Hotspur, sharing his thoughts on the team’s recent performance and preparations. In a pre-match press conference, Ranieri expressed his awareness of the challenges that lie ahead. He began by acknowledging the strength of their opponents, stating, “It will not be an easy match, and we know that. They have won 13 out of their last 15 European matches and drawn 2. They are in excellent form.” He praised Tottenham’s style of play, saying, “They grind out games and press hard; it’s the kind of football The post Ranieri: “The only two teams that could bring me out of retirement were Roma or Cagliari” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Claudio Ranieri reveals love for Spurs style as veteran coach visits with Roma
arts.sum: Ranieri had retired in May but was tempted to return to the touchline for a third spell with the Giallorossi.

arts.ttl: Europa League | Tottenham Hotspur v Roma: Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur welcome Roma to North London for a crucial Europa League encounter on Thursday, with both sides looking to improve their standing in the competition. The match marks a return to England for Roma’s new manager Claudio Ranieri, who famously led Leicester City to a Premier League title in 2016, pipping Spurs in the process. Spurs enter the fixture on a high after their stunning 4-0 victory over Manchester City in the Premier League. This result showcased Tottenham’s offensive prowess, as they are now the league’s top scorers.
